testDescription: Verify a valid user logs in and reaches the authenticated shell — the search menu and welcome message are visible.

testTitle: Login fails with an invalid password
testDescription: Verify login is rejected when the username is valid but the password is wrong, and the invalid-credentials error is shown.

testTitle: Login fails with an invalid username
testDescription: Verify login is rejected when the username is invalid, and the invalid-credentials error is shown.

testTitle: Login fails with invalid username and password
testDescription: Verify login is rejected when both the username and password are invalid, and the invalid-credentials error is shown.

testTitle: Create a user with all fields populated
testDescription: Verify that an administrator user can be created with all fields populated and appears in the Users list.

testTitle: Create a user with only the required fields
testDescription: Verify that a user can be created with only the required fields.

testTitle: Every Role option is selectable and a non-administrator user can be created
testDescription: Verify that every Role option is selectable and a user can be created with a non-administrator role.

testTitle: Creating a user with an Initials value already in use is rejected
testDescription: Verify that creating a user with an Initials value already in use is rejected.
